name: Avatar
description: User avatar with image, fallback initials, and size variants.
whenToUse: Representing a user or entity with their photo or initials.
avoidWhen: Displaying a generic icon - use Icon.
accessibilityRequirements: alt is required. Falls back to initials derived from alt text.

alt.description: Alt text - required for accessibility. Initials are derived from this.

fallback.description: Explicit initials or text shown when image fails.

parts.name: AvatarFallback
parts.description: Fallback content when Avatar image is missing.

route.label: Avatar
route.description: User profile images with fallback initials

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center">
    <sg-avatar size="sm" alt="John Doe" />
    <sg-avatar size="md" alt="Jane Smith" />
    <sg-avatar size="lg" alt="Bob Wilson" fallback="BW" />
</sg-stack>

examples.title: With Fallback
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center">
    <sg-avatar alt="John Doe" fallback="JD" />
    <sg-avatar alt="Jane Smith" fallback="JS" />
    <sg-avatar alt="Bob Wilson" fallback="BW" />
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Avatar Group
With Image
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center">
    <sg-avatar size="lg" alt="shadcn" src="https://github.com/shadcn.png" />
    <sg-avatar size="lg" alt="User with fallback" src="invalid-url-to-show-fallback" fallback="UF" />
</sg-stack>
